How it works1 · Primary2 · Secondary3 · University4 · IndustryAbout

About & provenance

Where this comes from

Palestra AI started as a two-year pilot (AY 2024/25 – 2025/26) across schools in Avola, Sicily — "L'Intelligenza Artificiale spiegata dai ragazzi ai bambini" (AI explained by teenagers to children). This platform is jointly developed to carry that methodology forward.

The school network

Avola, Sicily

IC G. Bianca

Primary school partner. Host of the Four Stations delivery and the 19 May 2026 closing event, with formal partnership convention in place.

IC Capuana–De Amicis

Second primary partner in the Avola network, part of the two-year pilot cohort.

Liceo Majorana (IISS Majorana)

Secondary partner — home of the Teenager Circle co-educators (cohorts 3A, 4E, 5A in AY 2025/26), engaged through PCTO / Formazione Scuola Lavoro.

Phase I, by the numbers

A pilot already run, not a plan

~400

primary pupils across the two-year pilot

~150

Liceo Majorana co-educators (~80 + ~70 across two cohorts)

16

classes (quinte), 3 upper-secondary tracks involved

23

stories produced and catalogued (3A storytelling cohort)

61%

of pupils named "il successo non è solo vincere" (success is not only about winning) as the lesson they remembered — the single largest concept-recall figure of the entire POST evaluation, 19 May 2026.

1 in 3

pupils independently formulated "l'IA può sbagliare i disegni" (AI can get the drawings wrong) during the Comic-Strip Review station — what we call Human-in-the-Loop a 10 anni.

Source: POST evaluation, IC Bianca, 19 May 2026. Station-level ratings: Talento 71%, Valore 72%, Successo 78%, Comic-Strip Review 64% "tantissimo".

Closing event — 19 May 2026

Una Palestra per allenare la mente, il cuore e il futuro

The Phase I pilot closed with a public event at IC Bianca — families, institutions, the Liceo Majorana co-educators and the primary pupils together, presenting the stories, the stations, and the POST results summarised above.

Photo and video material from the 19 May event is treated with care: imagery of identifiable minors is reviewed before any public or platform use, separate from its authorised use at the in-person event.

Founder

Marcello Vinci

INSEAD Executive MBA, engineer, certified BIM Manager. Palestra AI is not a commercial edtech product — it is a methodological architecture introducing generative AI into education as a medium for human formation.

This platform

Jointly developed

This prototype is part of a research collaboration between Palestra AI and INSEAD for Phase II (AY 2026/27). Ownership and governance structures will be formalised separately — what matters here is showing how the methodology translates into a usable platform across the four levels.

AI Palestra.AI Platform

Educational architecture for human–AI co-formation. Jointly developed with the schools and partners of the Palestra AI pilot.

Levels

  • 1 · Primary School
  • 2 · Secondary School
  • 3 · University & Executive Ed
  • 4 · Industry

Confidential prototype — not indexed. Demo build for internal review, June 2026.
